zh.Sowerby Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾索維比 布里奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Rawson於1377年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Robert Rawson22歲，母親Cecily Palden27歲。他於1396年與Agnes Mares在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1414年在他的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.Sowerby Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾索維比 布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Rawson于1377年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Robert Rawson22岁，母亲Cecily Palden27岁。他于1396年与Agnes Mares在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1414年在他的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rawson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic meaning ‘son of Rauf or Rau’, Middle English forms of Ralph (see Rawe 3).

variants.name: Ralph
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman and Middle English Raulf, Ralf, an Old French form of ancient Germanic Radulf (from rād ‘counsel, advice’ + wulf ‘wolf’), hence the usual latinization of the name as Radulfus. Ralph was a common personal name among the Normans and from the mid 13th century among the native English. Almost 7% of men in the late 14th century were named Ralph. It was pronounced in a variety of ways, giving rise to a large number of different surnames. Ralf could be shortened to Raff, hence the surname Raff and possibly Raffel . Raulf was sometimes shortened to Raul, giving us Rall and Rawlin (see Rawling ). It also appears as Rauf, which was often shortened to Rau, hence the surnames Rawe and Rawkin (‘young Ralph’), as well as Haw , Hawkins , Daw and Dawkins , derived from rhyming pet forms. In late Middle English the diphthong -au- was sometimes simplified to long -a-, later pronounced ‘ay’ as in modern English day, which accounts for Rafe. This pronunciation of the personal name Ralph is still occasionally found in modern times. Ralph is a learned spelling of Ralf that became common in the 16th century. In Anglo-Norman and Middle English usage, the rarer personal name Rolf was sometimes confused with Ralf, which explains why Ralf is an alternative source for Rolf , Rowe , Dow , and their derivatives.

variants.name: Rowson
meanings: English: variant of   Rawson  . Compare   Dawson   and   Dowson  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Rawson was born in 1377, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Rawson, was 22 and his mother, Cecily Palden, was 27. He married Agnes Mares in 1396, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1414, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Rawson est né en 1377, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Rawson, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Cecily Palden, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Mares en 1396, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1414, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Rawson 1377 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Rawson 22 und seine Mutter Cecily Palden 27. Er hat 1396 in England Agnes Mares geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1414 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Rawson è nato il nel 1377 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Rawson, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Palden, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Mares nel 1396, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1414, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Rawsonが1377年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Rawsonは22歳，母Cecily Paldenは27歳であった。1396年にイギリスでAgnes Maresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1414年に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Rawson(이)가 1377년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Rawson(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Palden(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1396년 영국에서 Agnes Mares(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1414년 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Rawson nasceu em 1377, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Rawson, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Palden, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Mares em 1396, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1414, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Rawson родился в 1377 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Rawson было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Palden, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Mares в 1396 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1414 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Rawson nació en 1377, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Rawson, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Cecily Palden, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Agnes Mares en 1396, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1414, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
